children.name: h3
children.textContent: City Council Votes on School Zone Speed Limits — What It Means for Pickup Routes

children.name: p
children.textContent: New 20mph zones near 34 schools take effect March 31.

children.name: span
children.textContent: Affects your school pickup route on Maple St.

children.name: h3
children.textContent: Fed Signals Two More Rate Cuts Before Summer as Inflation Cools

children.name: p
children.textContent: Chair Powell indicated the Fed remains on track for 50 basis points of cuts by June, contingent on continued progress in PCE data from Q1.

children.name: span
children.textContent: Mortgage rates may drop 0.3% by June — relevant if you're house-hunting.

children.textContent: Downtown Transit Hub Construction Delayed Again — New Completion: Late 2026
